scope.summary: Corrects both robot-docs pool descriptions: user SQL remains pinned, while login setup and session identity apply to every newly opened connection, including local-pool connections, and setup failures fail the connection.
out_of_scope: Changing pool connection construction or session-setup failure handling; this close documents the existing connect path only.
The unrelated secure-stdio documentation work present in the shared checkout.
A live Oracle pool run; the committed regression is a documentation-contract unit test.

entry_points.name: robot-docs guide text and JSON configuration guidance
entry_points.trace: robot_docs::tests::pool_setup_guidance_covers_each_new_connection renders both surfaces and asserts the every-new-connection, pool-connection, and fail-closed setup wording while rejecting the old pinned-only claim.

limitations: The regression validates rendered documentation, not a live Oracle pool connection.
The underlying runtime behavior is documented from the shared connect path; this bead makes no runtime change.
